queries.question: What customer service advisors speak Chinese and what IT support technicians also speak it?
queries.sql:
SELECT Customer_Service_Advisors.advisor_name AS name
FROM Languages JOIN Customer_Service_Advisors ON Languages.id = Customer_Service_Advisors.language_id
WHERE Languages.name = "Chinese"
UNION
SELECT IT_Support_Technicians.technician_name AS name
FROM Languages JOIN IT_Support_Technicians ON Languages.id = IT_Support_Technicians.language_id
WHERE Languages.name = "Chinese"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?languages a :Languages .
    ?customer_service_advisors a :Customer_Service_Advisors .
    ?customer_service_advisors p:hasLanguages ?languages .
    ?customer_service_advisors p:advisor_name ?advisor_name .
    ?languages p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Chinese")
    BIND(?advisor_name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?languages a :Languages .
    ?it_support_technicians a :IT_Support_Technicians .
    ?it_support_technicians p:hasLanguages ?languages .
    ?it_support_technicians p:technician_name ?technician_name .
    ?languages p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Chinese")
    BIND(?technician_name AS ?o0)
  }
}
